decisions.title: BSIP2 TASK-133 revision calibration & scope sign-off (F2/F1/F4)
decisions.decision: Option A approved, and calibration magnitudes RATIFIED against real corpora (owner authorized proceeding through Phase E 2026-06-01). G1 magnitudes: F2 reconstructed x0.80 (conservative band-aware matrix discount; with the existing source-factor lands the effective protein-quality near the lower-middle of the empirical 47-81% DIAAS band) and collagen x0.55 (lowest matrix DIAAS, incomplete AA profile); F1 emulsifier/starch deltas = NEUTRAL/0 (calibration finding: the live EV-003 sprint1 tiering already realizes F1's directions - carrageenan/CMC penalized, lecithin-only carries NO emulsifier penalty so it is NOT over-penalized in proto_v0, native vs modified starch already differentiated by the regexes; the taxonomy adds exact identity for future tuning but no additional delta is warranted, avoiding cross-category destabilization and double-count); F4 BHA = -5 (small named penalty on additive_quality, BHT excluded). G2: F2 quality-only (implemented). G3: proto_v0 is source-of-truth; methodology.md weights re-synced at Phase E. Evidence: cross-corpora before/after (464 products, 7 corpora) -> 4 changed, 0 grade-flips; golden 11 PASS/1 pre-existing WARN/0 FAIL with no golden score changed.
options: A - Approve recommended package: build the structure now and defer numeric magnitudes (F2 discount curve, F1 penalty deltas, F4 penalty size) to a calibration run against real corpora; F2 discounts the Protein Quality dimension only; treat proto_v0 as source-of-truth and re-sync the frozen spec at Phase E
B - Approve build but fix calibration magnitudes up front before coding
C - Changes requested to scope before build proceeds
decisions.recommendation: Option A. Three gates not derivable from architecture: (G1) calibration magnitudes - 47-81% DIAAS is a band not a per-product number; constants.py states calibration is a separate phase, so build structure now and set numbers in a calibration run. (G2) F2 scope - discount the protein-QUALITY contribution only, leaving protein mass feeding satiety/nutrient-density (recommended). (G3) spec reconciliation - prototype has drifted from frozen spec (code: protein_quality 0.10, additive 0.10, processing 0.15; methodology.md says 9/7/18%); recommend proto_v0 as source-of-truth with a Phase-E spec re-sync. Directly affects F2's effective impact via protein weight.
decisions.notes: Does NOT block starting 133A (taxonomy) or the structural build of B/C/D - only the calibrated magnitudes and final closure. Full plan: C:/Bari/research/TASK-133_implementation_roadmap.md. Origin: TASK-132 evaluation. UPDATE 2026-06-01: 133A CLOSED; structural build of B/C/D COMPLETE and validated (report: C:/Bari/research/TASK-133BCD_validation_report.md). Golden 11 PASS/1 pre-existing WARN/0 FAIL (no golden score changed); cross-corpora 464 products -> 4 changed, 0 grade-flips (yogurt/milk/bread/hummus = 0). F4 FDA gate PASSED (BHA under active reassessment since 2026-02-10, no final rule landed; BHT not yet under reassessment -> differentiated). REMAINING for this decision: (G1) set placeholder magnitudes via a dedicated calibration run - F2 placeholders reconstructed x0.80 / collagen x0.55, F1 deltas NEUTRAL/no-op (must reconcile-retire the live EV-003 sprint1 nudges in the same run to avoid double-count), F4 BHA -5; (G2) F2 scope = quality-only (implemented as recommended); (G3) proto_v0 as source-of-truth + Phase-E spec re-sync. NOTE: F2 currently touches exactly one LIVE-corpus product (a maadanim soy-protein bar, no grade flip) - magnitudes must be ratified before any frontend rescore. 133B/C/D proposed status: BLOCKED on this decision.

decisions.title: Glass Box D5 disclosure posture + Wave 0 co-sign bundle
options: A — D5 non-disclosure may MOVE the headline grade on its own axis
B — D5 non-disclosure only annotates + acts via D6 confidence (no standalone grade move)
decisions.recommendation: Option B — Product Agent (TASK-179C): grade ranks disclosed data; opacity is a data condition, not a quality signal; a direct opacity penalty risks forbidden intent-attribution.
decisions.decision: Option B (owner-ratified via AskUserQuestion). When a product hides composition, Bari ranks only disclosed data, lowers D6 confidence (which can demote the grade + show a visible partial-info flag), and names the gap — but never docks the headline grade for opacity itself and never attributes intent. Opacity costs standing through confidence+flag, not a quality deduction. Wave 0 co-sign bundle also recorded: Q1 conservative-to-demote / reluctant-to-withhold (buy coverage over silence); Q3 contested-additive ceiling small/bounded/demote-only (aggregate of all contested additives <= ~1 grade band; trans-fat veto is a separate confirmed-negative tier, unaffected); Q4 drilldown exposes plain-language findings, never the raw six numbers or internal terms; D-SCO-1 co-signed (10 internal dimensions roll up into the 6 public ones as a relabel layer, not a rewrite — 0-diff-verify under flag when D5/D6 ship). Numeric thresholds for Q1/Q3 deferred to the normal Nutrition D7 + EV-### path.
